text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...I totally flubbed it out there, and there's no
excuse for it. I got whooped, plain 'n simple.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I thought I was puttin' my all into this, but maybe
that wasn't enough...
choice_data_list: You gave everything you have right now.
Let's use this frustration as fuel to work harder.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...Right. I did what I could, no doubt about that.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But workin' so hard for this lousy result doesn't sit right with me.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to shape up! Let's figure out what
went wrong and make things right next time for
sure!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I'll need some first-rate coachin' too! 'Cause the
next race is gonna be ours and that's that!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, Dad always said, "No matter how hard
times get, ya gotta stay bright and be strong."

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
All right! Time to get some trainin' in! I'm gonna
start fresh 'n pump myself up all over again!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: I'm never givin' up! I'm makin' first place my place next time!
